name: hupu-helper
description: JRs专属斗图神器，一键快速插入表情包！

scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && mkdir -p ./dist && bun build ./src/meme-upload.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser && bun build ./src/popup.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser && bun build ./src/content.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser && bun build ./src/background.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser && cp ./src/manifest.json ./dist/ && cp ./src/popup.html ./dist/ && cp -R ./src/icons ./dist/
scripts.zip: bun run build && cd dist && zip -r ../hupu-helper-$(node -p "require('../package.json').version")-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD).zip . -x '.DS_Store'
